name: Oxytocin
description: Hormoonka peptide ee endogenous. Uterotonic-ka koowaad ee ka-hortagga iyo daaweynta dhiig-baxa dhalmada kadib (PPH). Wuxuu keenaa foosha ilmo-galeenka wuxuuna yareeyaa daadinta dhiigga dhalmada ka dib. La siiyay dhalmada mandheerta ka dib.
indications: Kahortagga dhiigbaxa dhalmada kadib (caadi ahaan dhalmada kadib)
Soo kicinta foosha (goobta la kantaroolo oo keliya)
dose: Kahortagga PPH: 10 unug IM isla markiiba ka dib dhalmada mandheerta (wadada goobta la door biday). Daaweynta PPH: 10-40 unug ee 1L IV, ku shub 40-80 mU/daqiiqo. Haddii IV la waayo: 10 unug IM.
window: Bixi dhalmada mandheerta ka dib -- bixinta ka hor intaanay mandheerta dhalin waxay dabin kartaa mandheerta.
contraindications: Kahor dhalmada mandheerta (waxay dabin kartaa mandheerta)
Xanuunka uurjiifka oo aan madaxa la dhalin
warnings: BIXI KA DIB MARKII PLACENTA LA SOO DHIIBO -- mandheerta oo dabintu waa dhibaato nafta halis gelisa.
IV bolus waxay keeni kartaa hypotension daran iyo arrhythmia wadnaha -- had iyo jeer milo oo si tartiib ah wax u geli.
Saamaynta antidiuretic oo leh tiro badan - la soco hyponatremia.

obstetric.note: Uterotonic aasaasiga ah. Haddii atony uterineine uusan ka jawaabin, ka fiirso misoprostol, tranexamic acid (TXA), cadaadis ilmo-galeenka laba-geesoodka ah, iyo MEDEVAC degdeg ah.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
